untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cointegration testing, regression-based hedge ratio calculation, and stationarity verification across two securities. These are multivariate statistical operations that cannot be expressed using single-indicator comparisons. The allowed indicator set lacks: (1) cointegration test results, (2) hedge ratio values, (3) spread stationarity metrics, (4) cross-security regression coefficients. A pairs trading rule requires external computation before entry, not real-time indicator-based conditions.
translation_notes: Signal CHAN_QT_DRY_0 describes a pairs trading methodology (long GLD + short GDX at regression-determined ratio) to create a stationary spread. While zscore_20 could approximate spread mean reversion detection post-construction, the core signal—identifying cointegrated pairs and computing hedge ratios—falls outside the scope of single-indicator backtesting rules. Implementation requires a pairs-discovery module and external regression engine before any entry condition can be evaluated. Exit conditions were marked AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be inferred without additional context on spread threshold or time-based exit rules.
